stream_samples.text: payment_intent fails silently after 3DS redirect on safari 18
Apple Pay falls back to a full-page redirect when our checkout iframe is blocked. Customers assume it broke.
Auth rate dropped 2.1pp week-over-week. Cohort filter says it's all Safari.
[#8812 P1] customer completes 3DS challenge, payment_intent stays in requires_action forever
Radar flagged 12% of valid orders after the v3 rollout. Our chargeback rate didn't even move.
stripe atlas onboarding broke for me at the EIN step yesterday, support said "known issue"
Webhook idempotency docs unclear — replays caused duplicate charges in our staging env
Subscription proration math is off by a cent when changing plans mid-cycle on annual
Connect Express dashboard 2FA loops on Chrome 130 mobile, can't get past the SMS step
[checkout-link] Stripe Checkout link returns 500 when locale param is invalid instead of falling back
finally pulled the trigger on Stripe Tax. ripping out our internal calc this sprint, huge win
why does the dashboard say 'requires_action' but the customer swears they paid? what am I missing
Refund ETA in our customer email is wrong for non-USD payments — says 5-10 days, actual is 3
Embedded checkout taking 4-5s to first paint on slow 3G in the field. lost cart instrumentation confirms.
Identity verification rejecting valid Brazilian passports since the v2 ML model rolled out

clusters.title: Atlas onboarding incompletes at EIN step

top_epic.title: Resolve payment_intent 3DS failures on Safari
top_epic.rationale: Stripe's clearest live insight is a spike in 3DS authorization failures on Safari 18, reinforced by cross-channel evidence: 2,140 signals from X, Zendesk and Reddit, correlated to a 2-point auth-rate dip in production.
top_epic.recommendation: Prioritize payment success and onboarding trust before expanding account surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Handle apple-pay 3DS redirect race on Safari 18
Fall back to native challenge when top-frame blocked
Dashboard surfaces affected merchants within 30 min

evidence.quote: My auth rate just dropped 2 points overnight. Only Safari users.
#8812 — customer can complete 3DS but intent never confirms.
Radar flagged 12% of valid orders after the v3 rollout.
